title: The Soldier Raises Rebecca
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the soldier raises rebecca, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Dressrosa Citizens, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: For hundreds of years now, this destitute country has been ruled over by the Riku Royal Family!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Ultimately, that despicable family greedily stole away money and resources from you, the people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You sure can work! Even though you're a toy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And he's always by your side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: seems like it's cold... although with this tin body I can't feel it, myself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And he's always by your side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The empty ones are yours to use as you please.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This town was burned by the Riku Royal Fighters, so most people have moved out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: There are some more toys over there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: And children too... why not go play with them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: But in this town, we're in public view, so we must honor the "toy laws"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: When you're asleep at night, I'll go to the "toy house" ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: But I'll be sure to return in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: As proof that I'm always by your side...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Every morning, I'll drop one of these flower petals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Ain't got nobody to look after her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Let's catch her and sell her off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Forgive me... I'm now a wanted man...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufu! But we're together! Now let's find a new place to live!

summary: The Soldier Raises Rebecca focuses on Dressrosa Citizens, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.
